category_sources: source_facts.description says cargo-c is a helper program to build and install C-like libraries.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub repository; its README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes building/installing C-like libraries; source_facts.executables are Cargo subcommands.
